items.title: Terrible GTA Trilogy remasters were actually enjoyed by "a lot of people," says studio boss who "agreed with most of the people's reactions"
items.excerpt: He believes better remasters can only come from Rockstar

items.title: Surprising no one, GTA 6 is at the top of the PlayStation Store in practically every country in the world
items.excerpt: Grand Theft Auto 6 is topping the PlayStation Store charts across nearly every regional version of Sony's digital store. Since pre-orders went live on 25th June, the game has shot to the top of the various PS Stores worldwide.
items.moneyAngle: Use this for legal preorder guides, affiliate shopping comparisons, and launch-week buyer education.
